sales.title:
Heritage World Coin Auctions - NYINC Signature Sale 3129, Lot 34061 — Ancients
Trajan (AD 98-117). AV aureus (19mm, 7.29 gm, 7h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 4/5, Fine Style. Rome, AD 116-117. IMP CAES NER TRAIAN OP-TIM AVG GERM DAC, laureate, draped, and cuirassed bust of Traj
sales.description:
Ancients
Trajan (AD 98-117). AV aureus (19mm, 7.29 gm, 7h). NGC Choice AU 5/5 - 4/5, Fine Style. Rome, AD 116-117. IMP CAES NER TRAIAN OP-TIM AVG GERM DAC, laureate, draped, and cuirassed bust of Trajan right, seen from behind / PARTHICO P M TR P COS VI P P S P Q R, radiate, draped bust of Sol right, seen from the front. Calicó 1038a. RIC II 329. Impressively detailed and struck. 

Ex Numismatica Ars Classica, Auction 138 (18 May 2023), lot 683; Numismatica Ars Classica, Auction 88 (8 October ...

sales.description:
AU Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5, brushed; a wonderful example - boasting impressive detail | ROMAN EMPIRE. Trajan Decius. 
Gold Aureus, AD 250. Rome. 
Obv: IMP C M Q TRAIANVS DECIVS AVG, laureate and cuirassed bust right. Rev: VBERITAS AVG, Uberitas, draped, standing left, holding purse and cornucopiae.

In secure plastic holder, graded NGC AU Strike: 5/5 Surface: 3/5, brushed; a wonderful example - boasting impressive detail, certification number 6945738-001.

Trajan Decius, who reigned from AD 2...
